content.title: Intel Slides 5%, AMD Drops 3%: The Semiconductor Sector Is at a Crossroads
content.summary: Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) shares are sliding 5% in Monday trading, pulling back to the $41 area. Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) is also in the red, falling 3% to $196 and change. The pullback carries a sharp irony. Both stocks surged last Wednesday, March 25, after reports emerged that Intel and AMD plan to raise CPU prices ...
